name: Satoru Gojo
description:
“I think it slipped in...” l in which you and Satoru visit sauna.

Funny thing; Satoru is virgin. To make it funnier, pls make yourself a virgin too😭

Also I think y'all are trying to kill me? This is a request from @gojosbishh, please. Can I get normal suggestions 😭😭

Also yes, I love you Nari please dont request this again.

Anyways I hope all of you have an amazamazing day, I'm writing this while I'm on my way home from work 😵‍💫

Much love,
